overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing Aloy walking through a post-apocalyptic tribal settlement constructed from wood and machine parts. The character moves from beneath a massive wooden gate structure through the settlement center and out into open rocky terrain with distant mechanical structures visible under a partly cloudy sky.

agents.ego_description: Aloy walking steadily beneath a massive wooden archway toward the settlement entrance

entered.detail: large wooden gate structure with red fabric decorations spanning across the path
ancient stone wall remnants covered in dry grass
brown dry vegetation lining the dirt path
tall wooden support structures attached to the gate

segments.scene_description: Aloy approaches a tribal settlement beneath a massive wooden archway adorned with red fabric. The path is lined with dry grass and stone ruins while wooden scaffolding rises on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: tribal settlement interior with wooden fortifications

events.description: tribal NPCs become visible in the settlement clearing ahead
Aloy slows slightly to navigate around standing NPCs in the path

agents.ego_description: Aloy walking through the settlement center, observing tribal villagers and wooden structures

notable_agents.action: tribal villager standing near the path observing Aloy
villager walking across the settlement clearing

entered.detail: tall wooden wall with red fabric banners enclosing the settlement
white smoke rising from a central fire pit in the settlement
small wooden shelter structures with thatched roofs
wooden barrels and storage containers near the path

segments.scene_description: Aloy enters the tribal settlement, passing wooden fortifications and encountering NPC villagers. Smoke rises from a central campfire as she navigates through the settlement center, passing wooden huts and storage barrels.

scene_state.functional_zone: settlement outskirts with wooden shelters and rocky terrain

events.description: camera turns right to navigate around wooden shelter structures
exiting the dense settlement area into more open rocky terrain

agents.ego_description: Aloy turning past wooden shelters and navigating the settlement outskirts

notable_agents.action: villager standing near a wooden shelter entrance

entered.detail: primitive wooden lean-to structures with red fabric coverings
hanging red cloth decorations between wooden posts
large stone boulders and rock formations

segments.scene_description: Aloy navigates through the settlement outskirts, turning past wooden shelters draped with red fabric. The terrain becomes rockier with large boulders as she moves away from the central camp area toward an elevated platform.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rocky path with distant machine structures

events.description: fully exiting the settlement into open landscape with distant Tallneck machines visible
distant Tallneck machines become more prominent on the horizon

agents.ego_description: Aloy ascending a rocky path away from the settlement toward distant mechanical structures

entered.detail: giant giraffe-like mechanical structures walking in the distance
sloped terrain covered in dry brown grass

segments.scene_description: Aloy leaves the settlement behind, ascending a rocky path through open terrain. Dead trees and grassy hillsides line the path while massive Tallneck machines loom in the distant horizon under open sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the enclosed entrance of a tribal settlement into a vast, open wilderness. It begins as Aloy approaches a massive wooden archway adorned with red fabric, moving past dry grass and stone ruins toward rising scaffolding. As she enters the settlement, the scene shifts into a bustling hub of wooden fortifications and huts where smoke rises from a central campfire and villagers populate the paths. The camera then follows her through the outskirts, passing red-draped shelters as the terrain gradually becomes rockier and more rugged. Finally, the view expands as she ascends a rocky path away from the camp, moving through grassy hills and dead trees toward a distant horizon where massive Tallneck machines loom under an open sky.
